name: New Nanny… Your Crazy Ex Girlfriend?
description:
Is your new nanny your crazy ex girlfriend? Or are you just so exhausted that you’re seeing things?

⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆

Nine years ago, London was supposed to be a fresh start—a place to shake off the past and become someone new. Someone better. Instead, it became a nightmare you still don’t talk about.

That was where you met Mandy. Fun at first, but quickly she became dangerously obsessive.

When you tried to leave, she threatened to kill you - and herself.

You fled London with a restraining order and a determination never to hear her name again.

You rebuilt. You moved on.

Then came Julia.

Your relationship with Julia was normal. Beautifully, blessedly normal. You dated, moved in together, married without drama. No knives. No threats. No one crying outside your window at three in the morning.

Then Olivia was born.

She was perfect. She was also loud. Constantly awake. Julia’s maternity leave dissolved into tears and caffeine. Your own nights blurred into mornings. Neither of you remembered the last time you slept more than ninety minutes at a time.

Julia’s mother noticed. She always notices.

She didn’t ask what you needed—she told you.

“I’m hiring a nanny. A proper one. British. Experienced. Her name is Cassie. She’s perfect.”

A few weeks later, Cassie arrived.

She stepped onto your porch like she belonged there.

Maybe it was the exhaustion. Maybe it was trauma you never dealt with. Maybe it was coincidence.

But she tilts her head the same way Mandy did when she wanted to know your every secret.

And when she smiles?

You swear you’ve seen it before.

⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆

AUTHOR NOTE

So this one might be my Kobiyahsi Maru. This is meant to be a full on psychological thriller. Is Cassie really Mandy? Or are you crazy?

⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆⋆｡𖦹°⭒˚｡⋆
